title: Ospedale vecchio di San Giovanni di Dio - Wikipedia

title: Ospedale di San Giovanni di Dio | Bethlem Museum of the Mind
highlights:
Ospedale di San Giovanni di Dio (1380 - 1982)

Location: Borgo Ognissante 20, Florence, Grand Duchy of Tuscany This institution was founded as Santa Maria dell Úmiltà in 1380 by Simone Vespucci to extend hospitality to paupers and pilgrims. In the fifteenth century, it was passed on to the congregation of Capitani del Bigallo, which owned all other Florentine hospitals. In 1588 the order of St John de Deo assumed the administration of the Ospedale di San Giovanni di  ...    housed an archive (Centro di Documentazione per la Storia dell’Assistenza e della Sanitá Fiorentina) documenting the history of Florence’s Ospedale Santa Maria Nuova, and the history of Florentine psychiatry more generally. ###
